workflow.name: KDBP Adaptive Code Review
workflow.critical: The workflow execution engine is governed by: {project-root}/_kdbp/core/workflow.xml
You MUST have already loaded and processed: {installed_path}/workflow.yaml
Communicate all responses in {communication_language} tailored to {user_skill_level}
ECC ADAPTIVE CODE REVIEW — Orchestrator selects and spawns agents based on story complexity
AUTO-PROCEED MODE: Skip generic "Continue?" confirmations. Only pause at Step 5 triage and Step 7 test health decisions.
DBP BOOKEND PATTERN: Step 0 loads behaviors (or sets dbp_active=false). Step 9 is review checkpoint.

step.goal: Load behavior values into hot tier
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-00-behavior-load.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-01-knowledge.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-02-story-discovery.md

step.goal: Spawn selected ECC review agents in parallel
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-03-parallel-spawn.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-04-synthesis.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-05-triage.md

step.goal: Deferred item audit + tech debt story creation
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-06-debt-tracking.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-07-test-health.md

step.goal: Cost tracking, completion, and ledger entry
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-08-completion.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-09-review-checkpoint.md
